title: Brazilian Chicken Wrap
description: A delicious and spicy wrap filled with chicken, cheese, and vegetables, inspired by Brazilian flavors.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to 375°F (190°C).
2. Season the chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and your favorite spices.
3. Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
4. Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
5. Warm the Brazilian wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the wrap by spreading a layer of sour cream on the bottom half.
7. Add a layer of sliced chicken, followed by sliced red onion, jalapeno, and cilantro.
8. Place a slice of molten cheese on top of the chicken.
9. Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, and serve immediately.
